description: Style NoteA well fitting and comfortable inner vest is a wardrobe essential for all men and  chromozome, one of the country's largest fashion inner wear Brands,  caters to this requirement with this classic piece. Its pure cotton composition guarantees comfort during summer months while its knit structure contours your torso. Available to you at a price that does not burn a hole in your pocket this piece makes for a great buy.Product DetailsBlack rib knit vest, round neck, rib knit binding around neck and armhole, printed inner branding, brand badge at left bottom hemMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash warm with like coloursSize and FitRegular riseThe model (height 6' and shoulder 18'') is wearing a size M
